name: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Premier Business Credit Card
title: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Premier Business Credit Card (Chase)
text:
Card: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Premier Business Credit Card (Chase)
BEST FOR COST-CONSCIOUS SOUTHWEST BUSINESS TRAVELERS
Pros: Complimentary first checked bag for the cardmember and up to eight additional passengers on the same reservation,Preferred seat selection within 48 hours prior to departure, when available,6,000 complimentary Southwest points annually, on each cardmember anniversary,Elevated earning rates on spending at gas stations and restaurants (on the first $8,000 in combined purchases per anniversary year),10,000 points towards a Companion Pass, annually,No foreign transaction fees
Cons: $149 annual fee,Spending cap in certain earning categories,No lounge access,Certain perks are subject to availability,Modest travel perks, compared to other airline cards
Why we chose it: With valuable perks like free checked bags for up to 8 companions and solid rewards on Southwest purchases, this business card offers decent travel benefits without the high price tag. It’s a practical option for business owners looking to earn a Companion Pass and elite status while keeping annual fees in check. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: This card is ideal for business owners who frequently fly Southwest and want to earn rewards without committing to a premium annual fee. It’s especially useful for those who travel with colleagues or employees, thanks to group boarding and free checked bags for up to eight companions.
Annual fee: $149
Rewards: 1 - 3X points
Intro bonus: Earn 60,000 points after you spend $3,000 on purchases in the first 3 months your account is open.
Points valuation: 1.3
APR: 19.24% - 27.74% Variable,19.24% - 27.74% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99%
Benefits: Receive reimbursement for the purchase of up to 2 EarlyBird Check-Ins each year. Receive 25% back on Southwest Airlines inflight purchases made with your Southwest Rapid Rewards Premier Business Credit Card for drinks and WiFi. Receive statement credits for fees associated with point transfers, up to a maximum of $500 per anniversary year. If you or an immediate family member check or carry on luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier, you're covered up to $3,000 per passenger. Reimburses you for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours by passenger carrier up to $100 a day for 3 days. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft up to $10,000 per claim and $50,000 per account. Extends the time period of the manufacturer's U.S. warranty by an additional year, on eligible warranties of three years or less. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar that provides unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fee and lower service fees on eligible orders. After that, you are automatically enrolled in DashPass at the current monthly rate. Receive a $10 off discount each calendar quarter on one eligible non-restaurant order on DoorDash.
Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/airlines/southwest-airlines/reviews/southwest-premier-business-card-review/
